name: box_topological_ordering
description: Code should include multiple hierarchical boxes where output-to-input dependencies between boxes require correct topological ordering during ABC synthesis. Boxes whose outputs feed other boxes' inputs must be processed first.

name: abc_aiger_black_box_mapping
description: Code should include black-box module declarations that get mapped to AIGER format for ABC synthesis. ABC requires boxes to have properly declared input/output widths that align with TFI (true fan-in) circuit structure.

name: cross_box_wire_dependencies
description: Code should include wire connections spanning multiple box boundaries where internal signals of one box fan out to inputs of other boxes. This creates TFI (true fan-in) relationships that ABC topological order must respect.

name: synth_ice40_abc_flow
description: Code should include SystemVerilog constructs that exercise the synth_ice40 flow with ABC synthesis. The ICE40 architecture uses ABC internally for AIG mapping, which requires proper box ordering.
